caption: A man wearing glasses, a white shirt, a red tie, and a dark suit jacket speaks at a podium. In close-up views, he is positioned in front of a purple backdrop featuring the logo "IIEA com" and a circle of stars. He gestures with his right hand as he speaks. Wider shots reveal him standing at a wooden podium in a room with white curtains and a large screen behind him. The screen displays the text "Joseph Quion," "Chief Government Relations Officer of America, Government Affairs at Microsoft," and "The End of the West — The Stakes for the US and Europe in a World of Disorder." A small audience of people in professional attire is seated in front of him. A logo for "iiea.com" appears in the bottom left corner of the scene. The sequence transitions from a tight shot of the speaker to a wide view of the presentation setting.
